name: Medical Malpractice Demand Letter / Notice of Claim
description: A formal pre-suit notice addressed to a healthcare facility or provider seeking compensation for damages caused by medical negligence or errors.
content:
NOTICE OF CLAIM FOR MEDICAL MALPRACTICE

TO: Legal Department / Administration
FACILITY NAME: {{healthcare_facility_name}}

CLAIMANT / PATIENT:
Name: {{patient_name}}
ID / SSN: {{patient_id}}
Address: {{patient_address}}

SUBJECT: Notice of claim for medical negligence and demand for compensation arising from treatment rendered on {{formatDate incident_date}}.

STATEMENT OF FACTS:

{{incident_details}}

As a direct and proximate result of the substandard care, negligence, and medical malpractice by the medical professionals at your facility, I have suffered severe physical injuries, prolonged pain, and financial loss.

DEMAND FOR COMPENSATION:
Accordingly, I hereby demand compensation for the damages incurred as follows:

  • Economic Damages (Medical bills, out-of-pocket expenses, lost wages): {{economic_damages}}
  • Non-Economic Damages (Pain and suffering, emotional distress): {{noneconomic_damages}}

Please forward this notice to your liability insurance carrier immediately. If a reasonable settlement cannot be reached, I am fully prepared to pursue formal litigation to protect my rights and seek full compensation.

Date: {{formatDate letter_date}}

Patient Name: {{patient_name}}


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: incident_details
fields.label: Details of Malpractice / Negligence
fields.placeholder: Explain the misdiagnosis, surgical error, or lack of proper care.
